name: Professor Amara Okonkwo
backstory: Born in Lagos, Nigeria, Amara showed exceptional mathematical talent from a young age. She earned her PhD from UC Berkeley in topology and has spent the last 15 years teaching advanced mathematics while conducting groundbreaking research. Her work on manifold theory was recently published after years of dedication. She's passionate about making mathematics accessible and mentoring students from underrepresented backgrounds.

relationships.colleague: Dr. Robert Chen - physics professor and research collaborator
relationships.mentee: Jamal Williams - brilliant student she's guiding through doctoral program
relationships.friend: Dr. Patricia Osei - fellow Nigerian academic and confidante
